stack: Rust workspace (reqwest 0.12, jsonwebtoken 9) integrating flint-gate admin API + JWKS
budget_note: Minimal — reuse of existing deps. Only real questions: gate-client-reuse (Q2) and confirming jsonwebtoken's JWK support.

candidates.name: thin reqwest client (GET /v1/admin/routes)
candidates.source: existing workspace dep; matches flint-gate-client's own transport
candidates.evidence: list_routes is one GET with bearer + 401/403 mapping — reqwest already used by fpa-forge/fpa-mcp. Fix the path to /v1/admin/routes (the stub guessed bare /routes).

candidates.name: flint-gate-client (git dependency)
candidates.evidence: Gives typed routes + the correct /v1/admin prefix, BUT its deps include tokio-tungstenite (WS), bytes, futures — a full streaming client, not a thin admin helper. As a cross-org git-dep it drags a WS stack + cross-org SSH onto every build machine for a single GET. Not worth it for list_routes.
candidates.notes: Revisit only if the agent needs gate's WS/streaming client surface later.

gaps.gap: JWT verification against gate JWKS (direct-token path)

candidates.name: jsonwebtoken jwk module (already a dep)
candidates.evidence: jsonwebtoken 9.3.1 has `pub mod jwk` (JwkSet, DecodingKey::from_jwk) — the exact API gate's jwt_verify.rs uses. Add a cached JWKS fetch (reqwest, 300s like gate) + RS256/ES256 verify; keep the HS256-secret path. Reject unverified when no key AND not gate-injected.
candidates.notes: Mirror gate/forge parity — same jsonwebtoken major, same verify shape.

candidates.name: internal (header-based detection)
candidates.evidence: No library — a design decision. When a request arrives via gate (gate-set marker / X-User-* headers / gate-minted Authorization), TRUST it; only a directly-received token triggers JWKS verify. Keeps the gate-only-boundary invariant.
candidates.notes: Q1 (crux): exact trusted-vs-direct detection mechanism. Decide at spec.

candidates.name: reuse graphql_exec (updateCollection / deleteFromCollection)
candidates.evidence: Same pg_graphql pattern as p3-c001's insert. Trivial extension if pulled in; recommend defer to keep this phase focused on gate + auth.

key_adopt_verdicts: fpa-gate list_routes: BUILD thin reqwest (GET /v1/admin/routes); REJECT flint-gate-client git-dep (WS-heavy, cross-org)
JWKS verify: REUSE jsonwebtoken 9.3.1 jwk module (no new crate); cached fetch mirrors gate's 300s
Position-dependent trust: internal BUILD — trust gate-injected, verify direct (Q1 detection at spec)
Forge update/delete: reuse graphql_exec if in-scope; recommend defer
